architecture_summary: DUS3R/DUST3R is a transformer-based dense 3D reconstruction method that regresses pairwise pointmaps from two RGB images without requiring prior camera intrinsics or poses, then optionally globally aligns multiple pairwise pointmaps into a common 3D frame. The model uses a shared ViT encoder, transformer decoders with cross-attention, and confidence-aware 3D regression to unify monocular reconstruction, multi-view reconstruction, depth estimation, pixel matching, and pose estimation.

novel_contributions: the first holistic end-to-end 3D reconstruction pipeline from un-calibrated and un-posed images, that unifies monocular and binocular 3D reconstruction
the pointmap representation for MVS applications, that enables the network to predict the 3D shape in a canonical frame, while preserving the implicit relationship between pixels and the scene
an optimization procedure to globally align pointmaps in the context of multi-view 3D reconstruction
an all-in-one model that achieves state-of-the-art results on monocular and multi-view depth benchmarks, as well as multi-view camera pose estimation

key_claims.claim: DUS3R introduces a radically novel paradigm for dense and unconstrained stereo 3D reconstruction that operates without prior information about camera calibration nor viewpoint poses.
The formulation unifies the monocular and binocular reconstruction cases and can recover pixel matches, relative and absolute cameras from pointmaps.
The network architecture is based on standard Transformer encoders and decoders and leverages powerful pretrained models.
The proposed method sets new SoTAs on monocular/multi-view depth estimation as well as relative pose estimation.
DUS3R uses a shared ViT encoder, cross-attention decoders, and confidence-aware 3D regression to predict aligned pointmaps from image pairs.
Global alignment extends pairwise pointmaps to multi-view reconstruction by optimizing 3D alignment rather than reprojection error.
The model is trained on a mixture of eight datasets and 8.5M pairs, with CroCo v2 initialization and standard data augmentation.
key_claims.evidence_section: 4. Experiments with DUST3R / F. Training details

key_claims.claim: DUS3R achieves strong zero-shot performance on monocular depth, multi-view pose estimation, and multi-view depth, including state-of-the-art accuracy on ETH-3D.
key_claims.evidence_section: 4.3. Monocular Depth / 4.4. Multi-view Depth / 4.2. Multi-view Pose Estimation
